C

Character - Class in model
Subclass of the Entity class, models the basic aspects of moving characters such as the player and the enemies
Character() - Constructor for class model.Character
 
checkBomb() - Method in class controller.CollisionChecker
Method to check if the player is entering in contact with a bomb
checkBomb(Character) - Method in class controller.CollisionChecker
Method to check monster collision with the bombs
checkCollisionMonsters(int, int, int) - Method in class controller.ExplosionHandler
Check possible collisions with all the monsters in the monsters array
checkCollisionPlayer(int, int, int) - Method in class controller.ExplosionHandler
Check the collision with the player
checkEntity(Character, Character[]) - Method in class controller.CollisionChecker
Method to check the collisions between monsters
checkForPowerUp(int, int) - Method in class controller.JBomberMan
Method to randomly place powerups in the map when some soft-walls are broken
checkMonster(Character, Monster[]) - Method in class controller.CollisionChecker
Method to check if the player is colliding with a monster
checkObject(Character, boolean) - Method in class controller.CollisionChecker
Method to check player collision with the objects, in particular with power-ups and with the exit
checkPlayer(Character) - Method in class controller.CollisionChecker
Method to check if a monster is colliding with a player
checkTile(Character) - Method in class controller.CollisionChecker
Main method to check monsters and player collisions with the tiles of the map
CollisionChecker - Class in controller
Class to check the collisions between the various elements of the game
CollisionChecker() - Constructor for class controller.CollisionChecker
Class constructor
commandNum - Variable in class view.UI
 
contactMonster(int) - Method in class controller.JBomberMan
If the player touches a monster, it loses an heart life and triggers the knock-back animation
controller - package controller
